ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Continued To Jun-08-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Or Vacate Arbitration Hearing Date
Off Calendar Dec-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Walgreen Co.'s Motion to Continue or Vacate Arbitration Hearing Date is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to 5/7/2010. The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to 6/8/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Order signed. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:
Defendant Walgreen Co.'s Motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories, et one; and request for monetary sanctions granted in part, denied in part:
1. As to form interrogatory nos. 106.3; 110.1; 110.2; 112.1; and 112.4, granted; plaintiff shall serve verified supplemental responses within fifteen days of notice of entry of this order;
2. As to the remaining interrogatories subject to this motion, and defendant's request for sanctions, motion denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
